scripts.build: npm run build -w @optivem/commons && npm run build -w @optivem/channel && npm run build -w @optivem/driver-port && npm run build -w @optivem/driver-adapter && npm run build -w @optivem/dsl-port && npm run build -w @optivem/dsl-core
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w system-test
